title: lasthenia canescens
intro: Lasthenia canescens, also known as the purple needlegrass or western needle grass, is a perennial plant species native to western North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource for herbal remedies. Lasthenia canescens is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
